statement: In every magma, Equation 1222 (`x = y * ((z * (w * u)) * v)`) implies Equation 3831 (`x * y = (z * z) * (w * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0944
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w u)) v))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, (op x y) = (op (op z z) (op w x))
